title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Bata India

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Bata India
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Bata India! We are hiring a Store Manager for our Aurangabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Bata India:
Bata India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bata India!
